title: botrychium lunaria f. onondagense
intro: Botrychium lunaria f. onondagense, also known as Onondaga grape fern, is a rare and unique species of flowering plant that belongs to the Ophioglossum family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly by Native American communities, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onondaga grape fern include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Onondaga grape fern can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
